methodology.en: Generates draft observatory notes and bibliographies from scoped prompts, then routes output through human review before publication.
methodology.es: Genera borradores de observatorio y bibliografias desde prompts acotados, y enruta la salida a revision humana antes de publicar.

capabilities.en: Produce bilingual draft structures with frontmatter aligned to content schema.
capabilities.es: Produce estructuras bilingues de borrador con frontmatter alineado al schema de contenido.

capabilities.en: Attach source lists and model metadata for traceability.
capabilities.es: Adjunta listas de fuentes y metadata del modelo para trazabilidad.

capabilities.en: Suggest follow-up references for Library and Resources interlinking.
capabilities.es: Sugiere referencias de seguimiento para interlink con Library y Resources.

limitations.en: Cannot publish directly; human_review.reviewed=true remains mandatory.
limitations.es: No puede publicar de forma directa; human_review.reviewed=true sigue siendo obligatorio.

limitations.en: Does not guarantee semantic quality of sources beyond structural checks.
limitations.es: No garantiza calidad semantica de fuentes mas alla de chequeos estructurales.

limitations.en: Requires editorial constraints to avoid overgeneralized framing.
limitations.es: Requiere restricciones editoriales para evitar marcos sobre-generalizados.
